## Governance and Versioning Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed [`spec/GOVERNANCE.md`](../spec/GOVERNANCE.md) and this PR follows core/extension decision rules.
- [ ] I reviewed [`spec/VERSIONING.md`](../spec/VERSIONING.md) and classified this as Breaking/Additive/Clarification/Security.
- [ ] If security/compliance-affecting fields are involved, they are not ad hoc extensions and are registered + tested.
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, migration notes and mapping updates are included.
